items.title: Favourable delivery outcomes after bioprosthetic aortic valve replacement in women contemplating future pregnancy
items.title_zh: SWEDEHEART 注册研究:育龄女性生物瓣主动脉瓣置换后妊娠分娩结局良好
items.summary_zh: 发表于 JACC 的 SWEDEHEART 分析纳入 251 名 18-40 岁瑞典主动脉瓣置换女性:选择生物瓣者 50.5% 术后至少完成一次分娩、结局良好,但 15 年再干预率高达 46.5%。为年轻女性瓣膜选择的共同决策(生物瓣 vs 机械瓣)提供重要证据,引发瓣膜'终身管理'讨论。
items.summary_en: A SWEDEHEART analysis of 251 Swedish women aged 18–40 after aortic valve replacement: 50.5% of those choosing a bioprosthesis had at least one subsequent delivery with good outcomes, but the 15-year reintervention rate reached 46.5% — key data for the bioprosthesis-vs-mechanical decision in young women.
